title: Buttery Mediterranean Rye Sandwich
description: A vegetarian-friendly post-workout dish featuring crispy buttermilk rye bread with a mediterranean twist.

ingredients.name: Rye bread
ingredients.notes: Choose whole grain for added fiber and nutrients.

ingredients.name: Buttermilk
ingredients.notes: Ensure the buttermilk is at room temperature to aid in melting.

ingredients.name: Avocado
ingredients.notes: Chilled avocado will help create a smooth, spreadable texture.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella cheese
ingredients.notes: Use low-fat for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: Kalamata olives
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe, plump olives without pits.

ingredients.name: Feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional; adds a tangy flavor and is good for protein content.

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: For garnish and to add color and freshness.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For a hint of extra flavor but not necessary for vegan option.

instructions: Rub each slice with a little bit of olive oil and sprinkle lightly with salt.
Toast the bread slices until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side on a baking sheet.
Meanwhile, in a bowl, mash the avocado with a fork or masher until smooth.
Mix in the buttermilk, blend well to create a creamy spread.
Spread an even layer of the mashed avocado mixture onto one slice of toasted bread.
Top with shredded mozzarella and crumbled feta cheese (if using).
Fold the other slice of rye bread over the filling to enclose everything inside.
Brush both sides of the sandwich with olive oil or a bit of melted vegan butter for added flavor if desired, then place on a baking sheet.
Bake in preheated oven until golden brown and crispy around the edges, about 10-12 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing into triangles.
Serve warm as a snack or meal accompaniment.
